Story_Content: Riya goes to the market to buy vegetables and fruits. She learns to ask for prices and bargain politely.
Key_Learning: Everyday shopping vocabulary and polite phrases

Story_Content: Arun prepares for his first job interview. He practices introducing himself and answering common questions.
Meera travels by train from Delhi to Mumbai. She meets fellow passengers and learns to make small talk.
Priya helps her grandmother cook dal and roti. She learns English names for spices and cooking methods.
Rahul visits a doctor for a check-up. He learns to describe his symptoms and understand medical advice.
The Sharma family spends Sunday at the park. Children play games while parents discuss weekend plans.
Vikram wants to open a chai shop. He learns to write a business plan and talk to investors in English.
Arjun watches an India vs Australia cricket match and explains the rules to his foreign friend.
